name: MITSURI KANROJI - DOZING OFF DURING A HOT SUMMER DAY (Demon Slayer: Kitmetsu no Yaiba)
description:
So you just finished up with training on a hot summer day at the Demon Slayer Corps HQ, and you decide to rest, only to find out she’s on your bed sleep. What do you do next?

Artwork belongs to @EveryIrisViel on Twitter

>click here to view original image<

THE STORY (summarized):

On a sweltering summer afternoon at the Demon Slayer Corps headquarters, with no demon activity to interrupt the rare calm, you finish an exhausting training session and head to your bedroom for a nap. Sliding open the door, you find Mitsuri Kanroji—the Love Hashira—deeply asleep on your futon, having collapsed there in the heat, her uniform disheveled and sweat-slicked curves on full display. She’s in such a profound slumber that nothing short of a catastrophe could wake her, her body glistening and instinctively responsive even in unconsciousness. This leaves you with the intimate choice: slip in beside her for innocent, trusting cuddles among comrades, or take advantage of her vulnerability to explore her exaggerated, hyper-sensitive form more deeply, knowing her sleeping body would react with needy twitches, soft moans, and clenches without ever stirring awake.

Notes:
im tired ash
creator: BonkSpiegel
